title: Tutorials Index Page Rendering
entry_point: generateSubPages(rootDir) [line 612] — tutorials index block at line 685
activity_flow: generateSubPages calls buildSubPageData(rootDir) → resolves data {tutorials, skillsByCategory, ...}
GUARD: if (data.tutorials.length === 0) → SKIP tutorials index block, proceed to next section
renderDocsSidebar(data.skillsByCategory, data.tutorials, null) → produces sidebar HTML (tutorials listed first, then skills grouped by CATEGORY_ORDER)
renderTutorialsIndexMain(data.tutorials) → maps each tutorial to a card HTML string
FOR EACH tutorial t in tutorials:
wrap cards in <div class='tutorials-content'> with header (eyebrow count, h1, lede)
wrapInDocsLayout(sidebarHtml, mainHtml) → wraps in <div class='skills-layout'> shell
renderPage({ title: 'Tutorials | Impeccable', description, bodyHtml, activeNav:'docs', canonicalPath:'/tutorials', bodyClass:'sub-page skills-layout-page tutorials-page' }) → full site shell HTML
fs.writeFileSync(out, html, 'utf-8') → write file to disk
branching_conditions: data.tutorials.length > 0 → proceed; else skip entire tutorials index block
t.tagline || t.description → tagline used if present, else falls back to description
current === null passed to renderDocsSidebar → no sidebar item marked aria-current

data_objects.tutorial: { slug: string, title: string, order: number, tagline?: string, description: string, body: string }
data_objects.renderPage_options: { title, description, bodyHtml, activeNav, canonicalPath, bodyClass }

key_relationships: generateSubPages orchestrates all sub-page builds; tutorials index is one conditional block
generateSubPages depends_on renderDocsSidebar (shared sidebar across skills+tutorials)
renderDocsSidebar imports CATEGORY_ORDER, CATEGORY_LABELS from sub-pages-data.js
html_output_structure: <aside class='skills-sidebar'> (renderDocsSidebar — tutorials group first, then skill categories)
important_notes: Output file: public/tutorials/index.html. Output dir is wiped (rmSync recursive) then recreated before any files are written. Tutorial detail pages are written in a separate loop after the index. renderDocsSidebar receives current=null so no item is highlighted. buildSubPageData is the single async dependency; everything else is synchronous string building.
